goal: Enforce hard 2-star/3-star quota constraints in battle startup flow: generated decks must satisfy tier quota by level and battle start should block on any quota violation.
constraints: Keep cardsSource chain and runtime baseline checks intact.
Implement quota enforcement in a deterministic and low-risk way.
Do not remove existing 170+ card corpus; only constrain per-level deck composition.
deliverables: Tier quota enforcement wired into deck generation pipeline.
Battle startup pre-check that blocks invalid decks with explicit logs.
UI-level quota hint for current player level in card library panel.
Updated implementation note documenting hard enforcement.
